title: Count Anagrams
titleCn: 统计同位异构字符串数目

testcases.input: s = "too hot" Output: 18 Explanation: Some of the anagrams of the given string are "too hot", "oot hot", "oto toh", "too toh", and "too oht".
testcases.expectedOutput: 18 Explanation: Some of the anagrams of the given string are "too hot", "oot hot", "oto toh", "too toh", and "too oht".

testcases.input: s = "aa" Output: 1 Explanation: There is only one anagram possible for the given string.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is only one anagram possible for the given string.
